contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 20
- Description: Added two mermaid diagrams to BLOCKCHAIN_ANCHORING_PROPOSAL.md for non-technical readers via TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context#39 (merged 2026-04-22 as 7313b77 on main). Diagram 1 (section 2): 4-layer trust stack with LIVE greened and PROPOSED yellowed — L1 RSA-signed events, L2 GitHub raw JSON + Google Sheet, L3 TrueChain append-log, L4 public-chain tip anchor; each node carries the audience it serves (DAO-internal bookkeeping, semi-trusted partners, regulators/auditors, hostile challengers). Diagram 2 (section 4): end-to-end data-flow showing signed event arrives at Edgar, sheet row written, cache.json regenerated, sha256 computed and anchored to TrueChain, Telegram Chat Logs Merkle-batch feeding the same sink, daily public-chain tip anchor closing the loop. Used mermaid classDef live/proposed styling instead of per-node colours so retagging a node proposed-to-live when a milestone lands is a one-line edit. Chose mermaid over external PNGs because GitHub renders it natively and the source stays in-sync with the prose. No behaviour changes elsewhere in the doc — tables, scope boundaries, and promotion criteria untouched. Paired with Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: N/A
- Attached Filename: None
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
